prose: **Frontier orbitals analysis for TEMPO** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF. **Gas phase**, charge 0, **multiplicity 2**. Geometry: taken from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` with no re-optimization. SCF converged fully in 12 cycles. HOMO energy: −6.338 eV; LUMO energy: −2.465 eV; Koopmans-style HOMO–LUMO approach gives a **gap ≈ 3.872 eV**. Computation trustworthy per integrity-check verdict.
